| [Schedule Lessons Learned](../../_canonical/commercial-ops-schedule-lessons-learned.md) | Cross-App | Identify schedule-related lessons from project communications for close-out. Requires team validation. | advanced |
| [Schedule Narrative Draft](../../_canonical/commercial-ops-schedule-narrative-draft.md) | Word | Draft schedule report narrative from communications. Always verify against scheduling software for actual metrics. | intermediate |
| [Supplier Meeting Prep](../../_canonical/commercial-ops-supplier-meeting-prep.md) | Cross-App | Enter supplier meetings fully prepared with context on all open issues and recent commitments. | intermediate |
